title: Molders, Shapers, and Casters, Except Metal and Plastic
description: Mold, shape, form, cast, or carve products such as food products, figurines, tile, pipes, and candles consisting of clay, glass, plaster, concrete, stone, or combinations of materials.

tasks.text: Read work orders or examine parts to determine parts or sections of products to be produced.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Trim or remove excess material, using scrapers, knives, or band saws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Brush or spray mold surfaces with parting agents or insert paper into molds to ensure smoothness and prevent sticking or seepage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Engrave or stamp identifying symbols, letters, or numbers on products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble, insert, and adjust wires, tubes, cores, fittings, rods, or patterns into molds, using hand tools and depth gauges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean, finish, and lubricate molds and mold parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Separate models or patterns from molds and examine products for accuracy.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set the proper operating temperature for each casting.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load or stack filled molds in ovens, dryers, or curing boxes, or on storage racks or carts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Align and assemble parts to produce completed products, using gauges and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate and adjust controls of heating equipment to melt material or to cure, dry, or bake filled molds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select sizes and types of molds according to instructions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Patch broken edges or fractures, using clay or plaster.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Withdraw cores or other loose mold members after castings solidify.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair mold defects, such as cracks or broken edges, using patterns, mold boxes, or hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure and cut products to specified dimensions, using measuring and cutting instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Smooth surfaces of molds, using scraping tools or sandpaper.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure ingredients and mix molding, casting material, or sealing compounds to prescribed consistencies, according to formulas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove excess materials and level and smooth wet mold mixtures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify dimensions of products, using measuring instruments, such as calipers, vernier gauges, or protractors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Bore holes or cut grates, risers, or pouring spouts in molds, using power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tap or tilt molds to ensure uniform distribution of materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Construct or form molds for use in casting clay or plaster objects, using plaster, fiberglass, rubber, casting machines, patterns, or flasks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pour, pack, spread, or press plaster, concrete, or other materials into or around models or molds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
